title: PARSE
text: PARSE Parses a specified XML stream. Explain this code PARSE(XmlDocument, Validation) Copy Parameters Table 1. PARSE parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description XmlDocument String IN XML document to be parsed; maximum size is 10240000 bytes (nearly 10 MB). The encoding of the XML document is always UTF-8; do not specify a different encoding in the XML header. Validation Boolean IN Determines whether the XML parser will validate the XML it reads. Return Values If a fatal error occurs during parsing, -151 is returned, unless the FATALERROR operation returns a different negative value. In this case that value is returned instead. Table 2. PARSE return values Number Error Description 0 Success –57 <UACTERR_NO_INSTANCE> No handler instance set. If you invoke the PARSE or PARSEFILE operation without having set a handler instance, they will return this error and will not parse anything. –151 <UACTERR_EXCEPTION_THROWN> A fatal error has occured but there is no FATALERROR operation implemented. A FATALERROR operation is available but it returns nothing or a value >= 0. A fatal error is deemed unrecoverable, by the SAX parser. Description The PARSE operation invokes the SAX parser built into Uniface and the SAX operations of the handler instance. If any handler operation returns a negative value, parsing stops and PARSE returns with that negative value. For larger documents, you must use the PARSEFILE operation. Explain this code activate $50.setHandler($instancename) TF2="<?xml version="1.0"?>%%^%/ <note>%%^%/ <to>Tove</to>%%^%/ <from>Jani</from>%%^%/ <heading>Reminder</heading>%%^%/ </note>%%^" activate $50.parse("TF2", "T") Copy Related Links PARSEFILE Parses an XML document in the specified file.
